requirements_addressed: chunk_transcript returns single chunk for short transcripts
Prompt includes category descriptions, format instructions, guidelines
Code passes ruff check and mypy

completion_promises.evidence: Created src/services/__init__.py with a module docstring. File exists and is importable.

Implemented get_focus_categories() at module level in src/services/insight_extractor.py. Function resolves focus area names to InsightCategory lists using FOCUS_PRESETS mapping. Tested by 8 tests in TestGetFocusCategories class.

completion_promises.criterion_text: build_extraction_prompt(transcript, focus_areas, max_insights) generates structured prompt
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented build_extraction_prompt() with category descriptions, output format instructions, guidelines, and transcript embedding. Tested by 8 tests in TestBuildExtractionPrompt class.

completion_promises.criterion_text: chunk_transcript(transcript, max_chars, overlap_chars) splits long transcripts at paragraph boundaries
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented chunk_transcript() that splits on \n\n paragraph boundaries with _force_split() fallback for single long paragraphs. Tested by 8 tests in TestChunkTranscript class.

completion_promises.criterion_text: prepare_for_extraction(transcript, video_id, focus_areas, max_insights) returns complete extraction metadata
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented prepare_for_extraction() that returns dict with all required keys: extraction_prompt, focus_areas, categories, category_definitions, transcript_length, chunk_count, needs_chunking, max_insights, chunks. Tested by 14 tests in TestPrepareForExtraction class.

completion_promises.criterion_text: get_focus_categories handles 'all' keyword returning all categories
completion_promises.evidence: When 'all' is in focus_areas, returns list(InsightCategory) — all 24 categories. Tested by test_all_keyword_returns_all_categories and test_all_with_other_areas.

completion_promises.criterion_text: get_focus_categories falls back to 'general' for unknown focus areas
completion_promises.evidence: When no valid focus areas match, logs info and returns FOCUS_PRESETS['general']. Tested by test_unknown_focus_area_falls_back_to_general.

completion_promises.criterion_text: get_focus_categories deduplicates when same area specified twice
completion_promises.evidence: Uses set-based deduplication preserving insertion order. Tested by test_deduplication_when_same_area_specified_twice which verifies len(result) == len(set(result)) == 4.

completion_promises.criterion_text: chunk_transcript returns single chunk for short transcripts
completion_promises.evidence: Early return [transcript] when len(transcript) <= max_chars. Tested by test_short_transcript_returns_single_chunk.

completion_promises.criterion_text: chunk_transcript maintains overlap between chunks for context continuity
completion_promises.evidence: Overlap is computed from end of stored chunk and prepended to next chunk. _force_split also maintains overlap. Tested by test_overlap_between_chunks and test_default_overlap_is_500.

completion_promises.criterion_text: prepare_for_extraction returns: extraction_prompt, focus_areas, categories, category_definitions, transcript_length, chunk_count, needs_chunking, max_insights, chunks
completion_promises.evidence: All 9 keys plus video_id returned in the dict. Tested by test_contains_all_required_keys which checks all required keys are present.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Prompt includes category descriptions, output format instructions, guidelines
completion_promises.evidence: build_extraction_prompt includes Focus Areas section with category descriptions, Output Format section, and Guidelines section. Tested by test_includes_category_descriptions, test_includes_output_format_instructions, test_includes_guidelines, and test_includes_json_response_format.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Code passes ruff check and mypy
completion_promises.evidence: Ran 'ruff check src/services/insight_extractor.py' — output: 'All checks passed!'. Ran 'mypy src/services/insight_extractor.py' — output: 'Success: no issues found in 1 source file'. Fixed 2 ruff UP045 violations by replacing Optional[X] with X | None syntax and removing unused typing.Optional import.
